mapper.select: SELECT mr.matching_record_id, mr.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_status, mr.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.employee_tier, mr.matching_mode, mr.matching_status, mr.d_c_ratio, mr.expected_bonus, mr.expected_productivity, mr.quality_risk, mr.work_start_at, mr.work_end_at, mr.comment, mr.created_at FROM matching_record mr JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id JOIN employee e ON mr.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE mr.matching_record_id = #{matchingRecordId}

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.employee_tier, s.total_points, s.capability_index, 'EFFICIENCY_TYPE' AS matching_mode FROM employee e LEFT JOIN score s ON e.employee_id = s.employee_id WHERE e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY s.total_points DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(mr.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_assigned_count, SUM(CASE WHEN mr.matching_status = 'COMPLETE' AND DATE(mr.work_end_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'ANALYZED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM matching_record active_mr WHERE active_mr.order_id = o.order_id AND active_mr.matching_status IN ('CONFIRM', 'INPROGRESS', 'COMPLETE') ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unassigned_count, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN mr.matching_status = 'CONFIRM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(mr.matching_record_id), 0), 1 ) AS accuracy, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM matching_record WHERE matching_status = 'INPROGRESS' ) AS active_worker_count FROM orders o LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON o.order_id = mr.order_id

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, mr.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.employee_tier, COALESCE(DATE(mr.work_start_at), DATE(mr.created_at)) AS assigned_date, mr.matching_status, o.order_no, o.order_status, mr.work_start_at, mr.work_end_at FROM matching_record mr JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id JOIN employee e ON mr.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON wd.worker_deployment_id = ( SELECT wd2.worker_deployment_id FROM worker_deployment wd2 WHERE wd2.employee_id = mr.employee_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN wd2.start_date <= CURDATE() AND (wd2.end_date IS NULL OR wd2.end_date >= CURDATE()) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, wd2.start_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON wd.equipment_id = eq.equipment_id LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON eq.equipment_process_id = ep.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id WHERE mr.matching_status != 'REJECT' ORDER BY fl.factory_line_id, COALESCE(mr.work_start_at, mr.created_at) DESC

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS total_technician_count, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tier_s_count, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tier_a_count, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tier_b_count, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tier_c_count, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier IN ('B', 'C') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommended_count FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN employee e ON wd.employee_id = e.employee_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name
